Meaning.En: to keep or continue to have something; to hold on to something, especially in the face of pressure to give it up
Meaning.Example: The company decided to retain its top employees by offering competitive salaries and benefits.

Situation.Vi: Giữ lại nhân viên giỏi bằng cách tăng lương và phúc lợi.
Situation.En: Keeping skilled employees by increasing their salary and benefits.

Situation.Vi: Tư vấn luật sư để giữ quyền đại diện trong vụ việc.
Situation.En: Hiring a lawyer to maintain representation in a legal case.

Meaning.Vi: nhớ, ghi nhớ (thông tin, chi tiết)
Meaning.En: to keep information or details in one’s memory
Meaning.Example: She was able to retain all the details of the contract after just one reading.

Situation.Vi: Học sinh nhớ lâu các công thức hóa học.
Situation.En: A student remembering chemical formulas for a long time.
